steps.title: Spot the defining phrase
steps.content: The passage defines the features as “those that result from impromptu deviations of performers when fidelity to an established musical score is not mandated.” The word impromptu is the key—it means spontaneous, done without advance planning. We need a word expressing this meaning.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Extemporaneous directly expresses spontaneous, unplanned variations—exactly what the passage describes.

The other choices either wrongly imply unavoidable certainty, focus on visibility rather than spontaneity, or suggest careful precision.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
